scripts.bridge:check-services: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one node -e "const services = require('./src/services/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(services));"
scripts.bridge:check-auth: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const auth = require('./src/auth/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(auth));"
scripts.bridge:check-workflows: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const workflows = require('./src/workflows/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(workflows));"
scripts.bridge:check-routes: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const routes = require('./src/routes/clientPortal'); console.log(typeof routes); console.log(routes.stack.length);"
scripts.bridge:check-pipeline: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const http = require('./src/http'); const errors = require('./src/errors/ApiError'); const schemas = require('./src/validation/clientPortal'); const routes = require('./src/routes/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(http)); console.log(Object.keys(errors)); console.log(Object.keys(schemas).length); console.log(routes.stack.length);"
scripts.bridge:check-audit: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const audit = require('./src/audit'); const repo = require('./src/repositories/audit'); console.log(Object.keys(audit)); console.log(Object.keys(repo));"
